name: staged-rollout-monitoring
description: Production rollout with automated monitoring and rollback. Implements 5% → 25% → 50% → 100% staged rollout with health monitoring at each stage.

steps.name: pre_release_validation
steps.description: Validate app configuration before upload

steps.name: upload_bundle
steps.description: Upload AAB to Google Play

steps.name: release_internal
steps.description: Release to internal track for initial validation

steps.name: promote_to_beta
steps.description: Promote from internal to beta track

steps.name: monitor_beta
steps.description: Monitor beta release for stability before production rollout

steps.name: check_beta_health
steps.description: Verify beta health before proceeding to production
steps.command: echo 'Beta health verified - proceeding to production rollout'

steps.name: start_production_rollout
steps.description: Begin staged rollout to production at START_PERCENTAGE

steps.name: stage_1_monitor
steps.description: Monitor stage 1 (5%) rollout health

steps.name: check_stage_1_health
steps.description: Check if stage 1 passed health checks
steps.command: if [ ${steps.stage_1_monitor.exitCode} -eq 0 ]; then echo 'Stage 1 passed - proceeding to stage 2'; else echo 'Stage 1 failed - health checks did not pass'; fi

steps.name: auto_rollback_stage_1
steps.description: Auto-rollback if stage 1 health checks failed

steps.name: halt_on_stage_1_failure
steps.description: Stop workflow if stage 1 failed and no auto-rollback
steps.command: echo 'Stage 1 rollout failed health checks. Manual intervention required.' && exit 1

steps.name: advance_to_25_percent
steps.description: Advance rollout to 25% if stage 1 passed

steps.name: stage_2_monitor
steps.description: Monitor stage 2 (25%) rollout health

steps.name: check_stage_2_health
steps.description: Check if stage 2 passed health checks
steps.command: if [ ${steps.stage_2_monitor.exitCode} -eq 0 ]; then echo 'Stage 2 passed - proceeding to stage 3'; else echo 'Stage 2 failed - health checks did not pass'; fi

steps.name: auto_rollback_stage_2
steps.description: Auto-rollback if stage 2 health checks failed

steps.name: halt_on_stage_2_failure
steps.description: Stop workflow if stage 2 failed and no auto-rollback
steps.command: echo 'Stage 2 rollout failed health checks. Manual intervention required.' && exit 1

steps.name: advance_to_50_percent
steps.description: Advance rollout to 50% if stage 2 passed

steps.name: stage_3_monitor
steps.description: Monitor stage 3 (50%) rollout health

steps.name: check_stage_3_health
steps.description: Check if stage 3 passed health checks
steps.command: if [ ${steps.stage_3_monitor.exitCode} -eq 0 ]; then echo 'Stage 3 passed - proceeding to full rollout'; else echo 'Stage 3 failed - health checks did not pass'; fi

steps.name: auto_rollback_stage_3
steps.description: Auto-rollback if stage 3 health checks failed

steps.name: halt_on_stage_3_failure
steps.description: Stop workflow if stage 3 failed and no auto-rollback
steps.command: echo 'Stage 3 rollout failed health checks. Manual intervention required.' && exit 1

steps.name: complete_100_percent_rollout
steps.description: Complete rollout to 100% if all stages passed

steps.name: final_monitor
steps.description: Final monitoring after complete rollout

steps.name: generate_release_notes
steps.description: Generate release notes from git history
steps.command: gpd automation release-notes --source git --format markdown --output-file release-notes.md

steps.name: update_listing_with_notes
steps.description: Update store listing with release notes
steps.command: gpd publish listing update --package ${env.PACKAGE} --release-notes release-notes.md --locale en-US

steps.name: notify_completion
steps.description: Send notification about successful rollout
steps.command: echo 'Production rollout completed successfully to 100%' && echo 'Version: ${steps.upload_bundle.versionCode}' && echo 'Package: ${env.PACKAGE}'
